included_or_excluded: Scope: assigned ASINs (1723) x market_place='UK' x source_name IN ('AMAZON','REPLACEMENT') x order_date 2025-01-01 to 2026-07-14 inclusive. Sales_contribution restricted to source_name='AMAZON' per the Sales formula; Quantity_contribution is raw quantity regardless of source (informational only - the report's Quantity total additionally requires the Orders row-inclusion scope). Inprogress/Hold exist database-wide but contribute zero rows within this exact scope today - the rule remains dynamic exclusion (Cancelled/Canceled only), not a hardcoded include-list, so either would be picked up automatically if it appeared.
